model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["indexing","micro"],"rationale":"Increase effective optimization scale for the flat MLP: switch to AdamW, raise the learning rate, remove weight decay, tighten Adam beta2, and use a much larger batch to stabilize large-step training under the fixed checker budget.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 2048","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["summaries","indexing"],"rationale":"The cosine schedule regressed validation loss, so revert it and test a slightly higher constant step size on the stronger AdamW + large-batch baseline.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"],"rationale":"The optimizer/batch setup is already near a plateau, so the next low-risk move is to increase MLP capacity modestly by adding one hidden layer and widening the projection stack.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 2","new":"DEPTH = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 12","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 48","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"],"rationale":"The last gain came from extra capacity, so widen the MLP further with a modest first-layer expansion while keeping the rest of the optimized training setup unchanged.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 256","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 384","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["layout","topk"],"rationale":"The wider MLP has enough capacity now, so add a small amount of AdamW regularization to trim validation loss without disturbing the stable optimization setup.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"],"rationale":"The widened, lightly regularized model is already near a plateau, so the next lowest-risk move is a small learning-rate trim to smooth the final optimization phase.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.8e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"],"rationale":"The current configuration improved when the step size came down, so continue the local learning-rate search with a slightly smaller value.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.8e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.6e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"],"rationale":"The recent probes both improved as the learning rate decreased, so continue the local search with one more small step down from the current neighborhood.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.6e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"indexing","secondary_modes":["topk","caching"],"rationale":"The learning-rate sweep is close to flat now, so try a slightly slower second-moment decay in AdamW, which can help stabilize large-batch updates on the widened MLP.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["indexing","topk"],"rationale":"The beta2 increase regressed validation loss, so restore the better second-moment setting and test a slightly stronger decoupled weight decay on the widened MLP.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["topk","caching"],"rationale":"The model has likely become the bottleneck now that optimizer tuning has flattened out, so widen the first hidden block one more time and keep the rest of the training setup unchanged.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 384","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 512","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["caching","topk"],"rationale":"The wider 512-unit projection regressed, so reallocate capacity into an extra hidden layer while returning to the proven 384-unit width instead of pure width expansion.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 3","new":"DEPTH = 4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 512","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 384","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["layout","topk"],"rationale":"The extra depth clearly regressed, so return to the best-known 3-layer width and test mild dropout regularization there, which is the main untried lever left on this MLP.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 4","new":"DEPTH = 3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 384","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 384","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"caching","secondary_modes":["layout","topk"],"rationale":"The added dropout and stronger decay both regressed validation loss, so roll them back to restore the previously best-known stable MLP configuration before any further search.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"],"rationale":"The best run so far sits at the current learning-rate neighborhood, so nudge it slightly lower to probe the next point on the local optimum surface.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.4e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"],"rationale":"The lower learning-rate probe improved again, so continue the same local sweep with one more small decrease to see if the optimum lies a bit below the current point.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.4e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.3e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"],"rationale":"The low learning-rate sweep is still improving, so probe one more slightly smaller step to see if the local optimum continues below the current point.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.3e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"],"rationale":"The most recent smaller learning-rate step still improved, so continue the same local search with one more decrement to test whether the optimum sits slightly lower.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"],"rationale":"The learning-rate sweep is still moving downward and the last point improved, so take one final small step lower to probe for a better local optimum.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.0e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}
